company_context: PaaS Platform as a Service | PaaS Solution - EngineYard Ease your mind! Let us take care of upgrades, scaling and optimization with Platinum Support Learn more Menu Try Free Easy Application Deployment to AWS Focus on development, not on managing infrastructure Deploying, running and managing your Ruby on Rails app is taking away precious resources? Engine Yard takes the operational overhead out of the equation, so you can keep innovating. Fully-managed Ruby DevOps Easy to use, Git Push deployment Auto scaling, boost performance Private, fully-configured Kubernetes cluster Linear pricing that scales, no surprises Decades of Ruby and AWS experience DEPLOY MY APP FOR FREE 14 day trial. No credit card required. Thousands of teams with limited DevOps support easily run complex containerized applications with Engine Yard: Previous Next Deploy your apps faster, get better performance and security Even seasoned DevOps can’t keep up with the constant barrage of AWS changes. Engine Yard handles all the operational overhead for you. 1 CLICK GIT PUSH From code to production, seamlessly Simply write your code, commit your changes, and push to the remote repository. Engine Yard automatically analyzes your code, creates containers, and runs them on Kubernetes clusters. It also deploys utilities that offload background jobs and chrons. All while handling ongoing maintenance, planning for replication, backup, recovery and regular stack updates. PRIVATE CLUSTERS No sudden drops in performance To prevent the noisy neighbours problem, you get a dedicated AWS account and a set of VPCs. Private fully-configured, highly secure Kubernetes cluster. Compliance requirements are baked into the platform at no extra charge. ROLLING DEPLOYMENTS Deploy continuously Seamlessly integrate your deployment pipelines and maximize availability with rolling deployments. No downtime or performance degradation during deployments. Engine Yard leverages 12-factor app principles for a modern application deployment and management experience. Scale automatically and get an optimized, up to date infrastructure, around the clock AUTO SCALING Boost performance, control costs Engine Yard auto-scales instantly based on demand, boosting application performance and helping you easily optimize resource utilization as you scale. Pods can also scale horizontally based on cpu, memory and custom metrics. Pod sizes are configured in increments of 1GB allowing fine grained control. PRE-BUILT STACKS Intelligent infrastructure optimization We’ve defined highly optimized stacks for every application, delivering faster start times, better performance and greater scalability. The platform monitors application performance and uses these insights to intelligently optimize infrastructure with machine learning technologies. Infrastructure is also optimized automatically based on AWS best practices further reducing costs. STACK & SECURITY UPDATES Always up to date, no downtime Engine yard regularly updates your env

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps companies like yours streamline their data operations. I came across Engine Yard and was impressed with the work you're doing in the PaaS space. Can you tell me a little bit about your current data processing challenges?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes. We do have some data processing needs, but we're pretty well-covered with our current infrastructure. We're using a combination of in-house solutions and some open-source tools to manage our data. What makes you think DeepData AI would be a good fit for us?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Well, our solution is designed to handle large volumes of data and provide real-time insights. We've had success with companies in similar industries, and I think we could help you optimize your data processing workflows. For example, we could help you reduce latency and improve data quality. Would you be open to exploring how DeepData AI could help?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, but we're in the middle of a major deployment right now, and I'm not sure we have the bandwidth to evaluate a new solution. Plus, I'm not sure how DeepData AI would integrate with our existing infrastructure. We're heavily invested in Kubernetes and AWS, and I'd need to see a clear path to integration before we could consider it.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand. Integration is a top priority for us, and we do have experience working with Kubernetes and AWS. We've developed a range of APIs and connectors to make integration as seamless as possible. As for the timing, I'd be happy to provide some case studies and whitepapers to help you evaluate our solution at your convenience. We could also offer a trial or proof-of-concept to demonstrate the value of DeepData AI.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the flexibility, but to be honest, we're also exploring some other options, including some open-source solutions that might be more cost-effective. I'm not sure we're ready to commit to a commercial solution like DeepData AI. Can you tell me a little bit more about your pricing model and how it compares to some of the other options out there?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is based on the volume of data processed, and we offer a tiered pricing model to accommodate different use cases. We're competitive with other commercial solutions, but I understand that cost is a factor. I'd be happy to provide a detailed pricing breakdown and discuss how we can tailor our solution to meet your specific needs.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Thank you, Alex, but I think we're going to have to pass on DeepData AI for now. I appreciate the information, but I'd like to review it internally and discuss it with our team. Can you just send me an email with some more information, and we'll take it from there? I appreciate your understanding, and I wish you the best of luck with your sales efforts.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Integration
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's integration concerns and provided concrete examples or case studies of successful integrations with Kubernetes and AWS to alleviate those concerns. Sentiment: Neutral
